title: [FIRRTL] Rework Grand Central Views/Interfaces, Add XMR Support
body:
This PR is ready for review, but could use way more tests.

This PR is a big rework of the Grand Central Wires/Interfaces pass to do two main things:

1. Preserve the recursive data type structure of the input Grand Central Views/Interfaces annotation.  This is a change to existing scattering logic.

2. Rewrite the Grand Central pass to handle this structure.

More information is available in the comments and commit messages about what's going on here.
